title: SAEP-14: Update Offchain Collateralized Lending Artifact Section
post1Raw:
## Summary

This proposal is submitted by Phoenix Labs in its role as a nested contributor, as defined in section [A.6.1.1.1.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1.1](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.1.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1.1) of the Spark Artifact. The proposal recommends that Spark governance update offchain collateralized lending parameters and details.

## Background

Spark is scaling the offchain collateralized lending system to accommodate more borrowers, collateral assets, and loan volume. The below proposal would update various parts of the offchain collateralized lending section of the Spark artifact to support that scaling and account for changing market conditions within risk parameters comparable to those previously approved by governance.

## Proposal Details

We propose that Spark governance approve the following changes to the offchain collateralized lending artifact section:

* Enable WBTC and tokenized gold assets as collateral
* Adjusting minimum borrow rates

### Specification

Option 1: Yea

* Accept the proposal
* Adjust the Spark Artifact as follows:


[details="Artifact Updates"]
(added text is italicized, removed text is stricken)

> Change 1:

A.AG1.3.8.2.2.2.1 Bitcoin (BTC)
- Initial LTV: 80%
- Maintenance LTV: 85%
- Liquidation LTV: 90%
- Exposure limit: Unlimited
- Staked and wrapped versions: Coinbase cbBTC, Lombard LBTC, *Bitgo/Bitglobal WBTC*

> Change 2:

*A.AG1.3.8.2.2.2.6 Gold (AU)*
- *Initial LTV: 80%*
- *Maintenance LTV: 85%*
- *Liquidation LTV: 90%*
- *Exposure limit: $500 million (of which, not more than $50 million from XAUM)*
- *Staked and wrapped versions: Tether XAUT, Paxos PAXG, Matrixdock XAUM*

> Change 3:
A.AG1.3.8.2.4.2.2 Borrow Rate

The minimum borrow rate for loans via Offchain Collateralized Lending arrangements must be the greater of the following at the time of issuance or renewal:

* Sky Savings Rate + ~~1.5~~*0.3*%
* SOFR + ~~2~~*0*%
[/details]


Option 2: Nay

* Reject the above proposal
* Make no changes to the Spark Artifact

### Justification

This proposal, if adopted by governance, would make several adjustments to the offchain collateralized lending section of the Spark Artifact, and we share justification and reasoning for each component separately below.

**Enabling WBTC Collateral**

Based on a recent risk review (linked [here](https://forum.skyeco.com/t/march-15-2026-wbtc-asset-review/27769)), we would submit that WBTC now fits within Spark’s risk tolerance and presents an acceptable safety profile for acceptance as collateral. Onboarding WBTC as an approved collateral for offchain lending can open up new borrower opportunities and help grow Spark’s revenue.

**Enabling Gold Collateral**

There is growing demand to use tokenized gold collateral, and we would submit that this is a good fit for Spark’s offchain lending framework given the institutional slant of borrower demand and favorable risk profile of tokenized gold as an asset. Matrixdock XAUM has a relatively lower exposure limit due to lower circulating supply vs PAXG and XAUT.

**Adjusting Minimum Borrow Rate Thresholds**

Reducing the minimum borrow rate thresholds will ensure that offchain collateralized lending rates remain closely aligned with prevailing market benchmarks.

## Governance Process

This proposal will be subject to review by the Spark Risk Council and Operational Facilitator within 7 days of submission. If approved to proceed, the proposal will be included in Spark’s next available weekly governance cycle.

This proposal will use simple majority voting to approve or reject the proposal over a 3 day voting period.

Phoenix Labs submits this proposal as a nested contributor, as specified in the Spark Artifact at section ([A.6.1.1.1.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1.1](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.1.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1.1)).

## Conflicts

No material conflicts.
